PreToolUse.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = payload.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
blocked = ['npm publish', 'bun publish', 'git push', 'rm -rf']
if any(token in cmd for token in blocked):
    print('blocked: prevent high-risk shell actions without an explicit human handoff')
    raise SystemExit(2)
PY
